description: The BoxGizmo component is used to make the handles and visual for editing a box mesh or collider, and also handles the interaction with the handles.

fields.TargetSlot: The slot of the box to edit.
fields.BoxCenterSpace: The coordinate space to transform by when making the result of ``BoxCenter``
fields.BoxSizeSpace: The coordinate space to transform by when making the result of ``BoxSize``
fields.BoxSize: The field to edit for the box size.
fields.BoxCenter: The field to drive for the box center.
fields.LockOffset: Whether to lock the offset of the box so it's center stays the same.
fields._vertices: A list of fields to drive for the vertex positions of the cube gizmo visual.
fields._edges: A list of fields to drive for the edge positions of the cube gizmo visual.
fields._faces: A list of fields to drive for the face positions of the cube gizmo visual.
fields._sphereColliderRadii: A list of fields to drive for the sphere rotations of the cube gizmo visual.
fields._material: The material being used for the gizmo visual.
fields._handleSphere: The mesh being used for the handles of the gizmo like corners or faces.
fields._visualRoot: The slot of the visual root.
fields._visualPosition: The field to drive for the visual position.
fields._visualRotation: The field to drive for the visual rotation.
fields._visualScale: The field to drive for the visual scale.
fields._tubeBox: The tube box mesh being used for the gizmo visual.
